candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total row.

candidates.why: Best match for direct cost of sales / production-service costs.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating cost line.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D expense disclosure. It appears below operating profit as supplemental, so it was not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Best single recurring finance-cost line and appropriate fallback when no single total interest-expense line exists.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

variables.notes: Preferred shareholders-specific total equity line. This avoids using generic Total Equity when a better owner-equity line exists.
